nav.title: Pitch-Deck Agent
nav.loginHint: Some slides require authentication to view.

hero.title: Pitch-Deck Agent
hero.subtitle: Generate complete, production-ready pitch deck slide decks — natively inside mota-site-atom or any Next.js project.
hero.tagline: One prompt. Zero boilerplate. Fully typed.

role.title: What the Agent Does
role.subtitle: A specialised code-generation agent following the exact conventions of the mota-site-atom Next.js project.

steps.title: Scaffold Deck
steps.desc: Creates all required files under content/pitch-decks/<slug>/ — meta, sections, locales, constants, hooks, nav, theme and deck root.

steps.title: Register Deck
steps.desc: Imports meta.json into src/config/pitch-decks.ts so the deck appears in the listing automatically.

steps.title: Wire Viewer
steps.desc: Adds a dynamic import case in pitch-deck-viewer.tsx so the URL /pitch-deck/<slug> renders your new deck.

steps.title: Localise
steps.desc: Outputs locale JSON stubs for every supported language — English and Chinese by default, Japanese/Korean on request.

constraints.label: Next.js 15
constraints.desc: App Router, use client per slide

constraints.label: Edge safe
constraints.desc: No fs or path imports anywhere

structure.title: Per-Deck Layout
structure.subtitle: Every deck is fully self-contained under its own slug directory.

tree.name: meta.json
tree.desc: Title, slug, date, access tier, cover image

tree.name: deck.tsx
tree.desc: Root 'use client' component — wraps providers + renders sections

tree.name: constants.ts
tree.desc: SECTION_IDS, contentMap, THEME tokens, base classes

tree.name: locale/en.json
tree.desc: English canonical content for all sections

tree.name: sections/
tree.desc: One TSX component per slide — Hero, Features, CTA, …

patterns.label: Pattern A — Cinematic
patterns.desc: Full-screen stacked slides. Wheel / keyboard / swipe navigation. Best for sales & investor pitches.

patterns.label: Pattern B — Sidebar
patterns.desc: Left sidebar with scrollable nav. Main area switches sections. Best for technical & design docs.

design.title: The Mota Deck Visual Language
design.subtitle: All decks share a unified design token palette, viewport-adaptive typography and consistent layout patterns.

animations.label: Floating Particles
animations.desc: DynamicBackground — pure CSS @keyframes, zero JS per frame, ≤12 emoji particles.

animations.label: CountUp
animations.desc: Animated number counter triggered by useActiveSlide() visibility.

components.title: Shared @/components/pitch-deck
components.subtitle: A portable core library that works in mota-site-atom and any Next.js 14+ project.

bootstrap.title: Auto-Bootstrap on Every Invocation
bootstrap.subtitle: The agent silently checks and fixes all prerequisites before generating any deck content. You never need to say 'bootstrap'.

checks.label: Tailwind design tokens
checks.fix: Append d-* token block to Tailwind CSS layer

checks.label: Pitch-deck registry
checks.fix: Create with PitchDeckMeta interface + empty registry

checks.label: Tailwind content scanning
checks.fix: Add the glob to the content array — without this, arbitrary classes in deck .ts/.tsx files are purged and cards render invisible

checks.label: Global CSS code-element reset
checks.fix: Add CSS reset block + pitch-deck-page class on every deck root wrapper — prevents global code styling from overriding dark theme text

support.label: mota-site-atom
support.desc: Native support — Supabase auth, next-intl locale, lucide-react icons

support.label: Any Next.js Project
support.desc: Portable core — resolveUser callback, initialLocale prop, emoji icon fallbacks

workflow.title: Step-by-Step Process
workflow.subtitle: The agent follows a deterministic 4-step workflow every time a new deck is requested.

steps.label: Auto-Bootstrap
steps.desc: Silently verify and fix all prerequisites (Step 0-A through 0-H). Reports a one-line summary.

steps.label: Gather Requirements
steps.desc: Infer or ask: title, slug, section outline, access level, layout pattern, accent colours, theme toggle, particles.

steps.label: Generate Files
steps.desc: Create meta.json → locale JSONs → constants.ts → hooks.ts → nav.tsx → theme.tsx → section components → deck.tsx.

steps.label: Register
steps.desc: Add meta import to pitch-decks.ts and a dynamic import case to pitch-deck-viewer.tsx.

steps.label: Validate
steps.desc: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm type safety. Verify the build passes.

workflow.invocation:
@pitch-deck-agent Create a new pitch deck:
- Title: "Mota AI Voice Assistant"
- Slug: mota-voice
- Sections: Hero, Problem, Solution, Pricing, CTA
- Style: Pattern A (cinematic)
- Access: public

cta.title: Invoke the Agent
cta.subtitle: One prompt is all it takes. The agent handles everything else.
cta.example: @pitch-deck-agent Create a new pitch deck for [your product]
features: i18n ready — EN + 中文 out of box
Access control — public / user / admin tiers
Tailwind purge-safe — auto-detects content scanning gaps
Global CSS conflict protection — code-element reset included
